items.text: NTA Launches Dedicated Platform to Report Suspicious Claims Regarding NEET (UG)- 2026 Examination-reg.
Release of Admit Cards for the Candidates of National Eligibility cum Entrance Test [NEET (UG)]-2026, Scheduled on 21 June 2026- reg.
Opening of Bank Account Re-confirmation/Correction Window for Refund of NEET (UG) 2026 Examination Fee (Examination held on 03 May 2026) – OTP-Based Two-Factor Authentication Mandatory
NTA launches ‘Pariksha Karmayogi: Capacity-Building Programme for Examination Officials’ on the iGOT Karmayogi Bharat platform to strengthen supervision and invigilation for NTA examinations
Student-Friendly Measures Introduced for NEET (UG)-2026 Examination-reg.
